title: cyclobalanopsis lamellosa var. nigrinervis
intro: Cyclobalanopsis lamellosa var. nigrinervis, also known as the Chinese oak or black-veined oak, is a variety of evergreen tree native to China, belonging to the Quercus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower cholesterol and blood pressure due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis lamellosa var. nigrinervis include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardio-protective effects, which can help reduce the risk of heart disease and other cardiovascular conditions. This plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
